audit_items.proof_trace: Memory leak: ctx allocated via damon_new_ctx() on L434 is never freed when damon_select_ops() fails on L438, causing direct return -EINVAL on L439. Other error paths properly call damon_destroy_ctx().
audit_items.attack_scenario: Module loading triggers memory leak when damon_select_ops fails, leaking kernel memory allocated by kzalloc in damon_new_ctx.
